description: A warehouse operator is tasked with performing a cycle count for a specific section of the warehouse to verify inventory accuracy.

nodes.task_description: Generate a cycle count sheet for a specific warehouse aisle.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent prints or downloads a list of materials and their expected quantities for Aisle 5.

nodes.task_description: Physically count the inventory in the aisle and record the actual quantities.
Enter the count results into the system. The system flags a discrepancy for one material.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent enters the counts, and the system shows one material has a variance that requires investigation.
